name: Pablo
message: 21 miles in an afternoon is crazy. I am glad you caught up with them, you have a great group. It was such a special weekend

name: Mom
message: 21!!! Glad you made it there safely! That picture is so awesome 🤩

name: Kee
message: 21 is crayyy!! Love the hospitality you’re experiencing on the trail!

name: Thomas
message: Nice meeting you out there! Thanks so much for the info and for answering my questions about the AT. I think I'll aim for a early April 2027 start!
